titles.title: Blessed Be the Lord God Almighty

authors.author: Jugend mit einer Mission
Marion Warrington
Gepriesen sei der Herr, denn seine Liebe ist groß

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Father in Heaven how we love You We lift Your Name in all the earth May Your Kingdom be established in our praises As Your people declare Your mighty works

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Blessed be the Lord God Almighty Who was and is and is to come Blessed be the Lord God Almighty Who reigns forevermore

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Father of mercy be exalted May Jesus' name be lifted high For the sacrifice of love has won my pardon And His resurrection power gives me life
